# LinkedIn Release Post Template

Use this template when announcing a new cognitive-core release.

## Template

```
cognitive-core v{VERSION} released — {ONE-LINE HEADLINE}

{2-3 sentence hook about the problem this release solves}

{What's new:}
- {Feature 1}
- {Feature 2}
- {Feature 3}
- {Bug fix or improvement}

The framework now ships with {X} test suites and {Y} assertions total.

cognitive-core is a portable AI-augmented development framework with production-grade governance. Fair Source licensed (FSL-1.1-ALv2) — source code is publicly auditable, free for non-competing use.

Release: https://github.com/mindcockpit-ai/cognitive-core/releases/tag/v{VERSION}
Website: https://multivac42.ai

#SoftwareArchitecture #AIAgents #DevSecOps #ClaudeCode #FairSource
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Version number correct
- [ ] Feature description matches CHANGELOG
- [ ] Test counts updated (run `bash tests/run-all.sh` to get latest)
- [ ] License says "Fair Source" NOT "open source"
- [ ] Both links included (release + website)
- [ ] Hashtags at the end

## How to post

1. Go to linkedin.com
2. Click "Beitrag erstellen" (Start a post)
3. Paste the text
4. Click "Posten"
